parameters: This is your car, use it to travel around the

I have been filing tax returns in my dreams
If you want to practice your dungeon crawling
skills you can try the Clock Tower in this square.
It's a very easy dungeon and is clockwork based:
it auto resets every day at midnight, so new
adventures stopping at Ghent can try this before
the dungeon of the Omega Tower
They are sentient being and deverse citizen rights.
It's even more absurd than the goblin situation:
we have fully integrated goblins in our society but we
still keeping butchering the wild ones with no
remorse or regards for goblin life.
